bugs.error_message: kaif is not defined — Astro build/runtime error, site blank
bugs.root_cause: Astro treats { } as JS expression slots. Inserting literal text '{ Kaif }' causes Astro to evaluate 'Kaif' as a JS identifier, which is not declared.
bugs.fix: Replaced '{ Kaif }' with '{ Kaif }' (HTML entities) in lines 221 and 234 of index.astro. Logo uses <span class=logo-brace> technique which also avoids the issue.
